content.text: A focused statement of what this is, why it matters now, and the single outcome it changes. Kept calm and readable so the idea lands first.

content.text:
Demand is strong; focus is the constraint.
Two levers recover most of the upside.
Ship the core path now, defer exploration.
Decision needed: scope and owner model.

content.text:
Cost has dropped enough to be ambient.
Teams expect tooling that adapts to them.
The winning interface disappears.

content.text:
Activation recovered after onboarding.
Enterprise cycles longer, higher confidence.
Early support lifts retention most.

Unified API
Built-in audit
Own cloud

Manual hand-offs
Lost context
Slow loops

One surface
Living context
Seconds, not days

Lower risk
Faster approval
Limited upside

Higher upside
Clear ownership
Needs sequencing
